title: TheN4meless0ne's Better Vanilla
description: A lightweight modpack designed to enhance the vanilla experience
body:
![TheN4meless0ne's Better Vanilla Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9461d63942196f7187d06a54eab7a59017263b9d.png)
# TheN4meless0ne's Better Vanilla
TheN4meless0ne's Better Vanilla is a lightweight fabric-based modpack designed to make your vanilla experience as smooth and enjoyable as possible!

PS: If you are experiencing any strange issues, please post them in the "bvm-issues" channel on my Discord Server so that I can look into it! :)
## The main mods
- Sodium
- Iris Shaders
- Entity Texture Features
- Entity Texture Models
- Continuity
- Dynamic Light
- Shulkerbox Tooltip
- Better Statistics Screen
- Litematica
- Axiom
- Flashback
- And more performance based mods
##
*All mods are the property of their respective owners
